weather_line: Unsettled in the northeast hollows · duck activity reported at dawn

stories.headline: Duck Bandit Escalates: A Second Duck Materialises Overnight; Colour Confirmed as Deliberate; the Direction Is Not a Coincidence
body: A second rubber duck was discovered on the Jeep's bonnet at first light Friday morning, placed precisely six inches to the left of the first. It is a different colour again — not the amber of Thursday's duck, not the yellow of the earlier known examples, but a deep and particular green that, according to senior Jeep historians, has not previously appeared in the Duck Bandit corpus. Both ducks are facing northeast. The bonnet was dry. No footprints were found. The surrounding gravel has been examined and found to contain no information, which is information.

Steve circled the Jeep once at seven-oh-four and once at seven-eleven. He has not spoken a hypothesis aloud, which those familiar with his methodology interpret as a sign that the hypothesis is nearly complete. The brass ducks on the shelf inside have not moved, but were found this morning oriented four degrees further northeast than their settled position — a shift too small to be certain, too large to dismiss. Christine has noted the colour sequence — unknown, amber, green — and described it as 'not random.' She has not elaborated. She rarely needs to.

Ministry officials declined to comment. Weasleys' Wizard Wheezes was contacted as a matter of procedural habit and confirmed that green ducks of this specific shade were discontinued from their novelty line in a year they declined to specify. The Duck Bandit, who has never been identified, is considered by this paper to be one of the most operationally disciplined figures in contemporary wizarding life. Day 2 of what this correspondent expects will be a significant chapter in the Bandit's history.

stories.headline: Friday Quiet at Gringotts; Duty Goblin Attempts to Manufacture an Incident; Christine Resolves It Before He Has Finished Describing It
body: The Liaison Wing entered Friday in the condition that follows a good week and precedes a better weekend: orderly, unhurried, and faintly anticipatory. The duty goblin — identified in internal memoranda as Srankish, who has a talent for finding procedural ambiguity in documents that contain none — submitted a query at nine-seventeen regarding the interpretation of the word 'forthwith' in a vault access schedule.

Christine read the query, identified the relevant precedent from the Accord of 1842, noted that 'forthwith' in that context means 'by the close of the same banking day,' and conveyed this conclusion in a single well-constructed sentence. The query was resolved at nine-nineteen. Srankish has filed a separate query asking whether the Accord of 1842 applies on Fridays specifically. Christine has been informed. She is understood to have smiled in a way that is professionally indistinguishable from neutrality.

stories.headline: Ministry Issues Friday Bulletin Confirming the Week Is Ending; Notes the Development With the Composure of an Institution That Did Not See It Coming and Will Not Admit This
body: The Ministry of Magic's Department of Temporal Administration issued its Friday bulletin at eleven-oh-seven, confirming that Friday is occurring and that the week is, by all available measures, drawing to a close. The bulletin noted this without celebration, without relief, and without the map that has accompanied recent bulletins — its absence unexplained, its effect subtly destabilising.

In a supplementary note appended at eleven-twenty-two, the Department added that they are 'aware of duck-related activity in the field' and wish it to be known they are 'monitoring the situation.' They did not specify which situation. The Duck Bandit has never acknowledged Ministry communications. This is considered consistent.

stories.headline: Friday Evening Assessment: Week Declared Good, on the Evidence; the Warmest Lap Dispute Enters the Weekend in a State of Contested Equilibrium
body: Friday evening at the household was assessed, informally and without convening, as good. The week provided two brass plaques, one resolved arc, a northeast route completed to schedule, and the return of the Duck Bandit in a new and more deliberate phase of operations. Against this, the Warmest Lap Dispute has not been settled, the kitchen table has two papers on it that were not there Wednesday, and the biscuit inventory requires review.

Steve is understood to be in a satisfied mood, which he expresses by doing something quietly with his hands near the Jeep. Christine is understood to be in a satisfied mood, which she expresses by knowing things. The week, in summary, has been a good one. The weekend has not yet declared its intentions, but the ducks are facing northeast, which this household has learned to read as a direction rather than a bearing.

familiars_corner: Lucy: Observed the green duck from a distance of approximately eight feet for forty-five minutes Friday morning, having determined, with characteristic precision, that direct involvement would compromise her position in any subsequent inquiry. She has, however, formed a view about the colour sequence that she intends to keep to herself.

Ellie: Greeted the second duck with the warm, open enthusiasm she extends to new things, which at this point includes the duck, the shadow the duck casts, and the idea of a third duck, which she has begun to hope for in a vague and hopeful way.

Jersey: Identified a warmth differential between his morning position and his preferred afternoon position of approximately two degrees, relocated accordingly at one-fourteen, and has not stirred since. He is understood to be aware of the duck situation only in the sense that the house is slightly more interesting today, which he supports in principle.
founding_editor_note: Green means something. I don't know what, but I built the press out of materials that came in three colours for a reason, and the third colour was always the one that mattered. — D.

in_brief.sport: Gringotts Vault-Lifting Championships: defending champion unavailable for comment; is understood to have already lifted; the record stands.
in_brief.forecast: Northeast: clear with occasional duck. Southeast: nothing to report, which is suspicious. The weekend has been sighted approaching from the direction the Jeep is facing — arrival considered certain.

storyline_updates.title: The Duck Bandit Stirs Again
storyline_updates.summary: Day 2: A second duck appeared overnight, deep green, placed six inches left of the first. Both face northeast. The colour sequence — amber, then green — is confirmed as non-random by Christine. The brass ducks shifted four degrees overnight. Steve has a hypothesis he has not spoken aloud. Weasleys' confirms the green shade was discontinued. The Ministry is 'monitoring the situation.' Day 3 should bring either a third duck (completing a sequence), Steve's unspoken hypothesis surfacing, or a first tangible clue about the Bandit's identity or method — a footprint, a timing pattern, a duck with something attached. The direction the ducks face may be a message: northeast, where they've just been, or somewhere else entirely.
